title: MappingRule
description: One entry in MappingDocument.rules. `params` is validated against the primitive-specific schema in ./params/<primitive>.json (see design.md 4.2).

target_field.description: Output field. A leading '__' marks an intermediate field, dropped before target-schema validation.

sources.description: Source field refs (dotted paths). May reference an earlier rule's target_field (backward-only composition).

rationale.description: Optional model explanation; ignored by the executor.
